title: Python product runtime source generation

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Workspace, planning, and memory product-specific executable runtime modules are generated target output under generated/python from IR/contracts and codegen-owned primitives; packages/command-generation/src owns only generic generator, renderer, executor, schema, freshness, and conformance machinery.
proof_expectations: uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py src/agentic_workspace/contract_tooling.py
completion_criteria: Static proof rejects full Python completion while packages/command-generation/src contains product-specific executable runtime modules such as workspace_runtime_cli.py, planning_runtime_cli.py, or memory_runtime_cli.py; regenerated Python outputs provide the executable projection and black-box/Docker conformance passes.

non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Runtime projection inventory contract/schema, generated-package proof checks, contract tooling surfaces, focused tests, and planning state for this active lane.
execution_bounds.max changed files: About 12 files for the runtime projection inventory slice before the next implementation slice.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check selected files.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.

post_decomposition_delegation.decision rule: After this slice is bounded, decide whether direct work, read-only exploration, implementation handoff, validation handoff, or stronger review improves quality or saves tokens safely.
post_decomposition_delegation.required evidence: slice id, route, reason, quality risk, token-saving class, read-first refs, write scope, proof burden, stop conditions, and return contract
post_decomposition_delegation.route skipped reason: First runtime-provenance slice needs architecture judgment to avoid converting copied hand-owned runtime code into a false generated-ownership claim; delegate mechanical validation after the provenance model is encoded.

validation_commands: uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py src/agentic_workspace/contract_tooling.py

execution_run.what happened: Added python_runtime_projection_inventory as a schema-backed contract that inventories the six generated/python runtime and operation executor files as transitional generated-output debt, wires it through contract tooling, and teaches generated-package proof to reject full completion while any entry remains blocking or is falsely marked rendered.
execution_run.scope touched: Runtime projection inventory contract/schema, generated package checker, contract tooling loader/surface check, focused tests, and planning recovery for #979 promote-to-plan schema drift.
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check selected files.
execution_run.result for continuation: The runtime projection debt is explicit and blocks false full-completion claims; continue by converting operation executor/runtime behavior from transitional debt into command-generation rendered outputs backed by IR/primitives.
execution_run.next step: Start the first real generation-ownership slice: select the smallest runtime/executor artifact whose behavior can be rendered mechanically without copying hand-maintained product code, then regenerate and prove it.

finished_run_review.follow-on decision: continue current active lane; do not archive

delegation_outcome_feedback.route skipped reason: First runtime-provenance slice needs architecture judgment to avoid converting copied hand-owned runtime code into a false generated-ownership claim; delegate mechanical validation after the provenance model is encoded.
delegation_outcome_feedback.quality concern: Generator-produced output must not mask hand-maintained executable runtime files as full #892 completion.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check selected files.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Runtime projection inventory is schema-backed, contract-tooling validated, covered by focused tests, and consumed by generated-package proof.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The slice prevents false completion by making product runtime projection debt explicit; it does not yet generate those files from command-generation.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Runtime projection debt is explicit and proof-enforced; full lane remains open.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused static proof, contract tests, contract tooling, structured inventory, and ruff passed

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
